title: End of Topic Test 1 — Number & Algebra

questions.prompt: An arithmetic sequence has first term u₁ = 7 and common difference d = 4. (a) Find the 10th term, u₁₀.  (b) Find the sum of the first 10 terms, S₁₀.
A geometric sequence is 3, 6, 12, 24, … Find the 8th term.
Without a calculator, evaluate: (a) 8^(2/3).  (b) Simplify (2x³)² × x⁻⁴, giving your answer in the form axⁿ.
Express log₃ 9 + log₃ 27 as a single integer.
The third term of a geometric sequence is 20 and the sixth term is 160. (a) Show that the common ratio r = 2.  (b) Find the first term u₁.  (c) Hence find the sum of the first 10 terms.
£1500 is invested at 4% per year, compounded annually. (a) Find the value after 6 years, to the nearest penny.  (b) Find the least number of complete years for the value to first exceed £2000.
